title: RM03 no fake proof guard
objective:
Create file governance/validators/validate_no_fake_proof_guard.py with content #!/usr/bin/env python3
import json
from pathlib import Path

FORBIDDEN_MARKERS = ["placeholder receipt", "fake receipt", "self-issued external audit pass", "release_pass":true]
SCAN_DIRS = [Path("governance/proofs/external"), Path("governance/state")]

def main() -> int:
    violations = []
    for base in SCAN_DIRS:
        if not base.exists():
            continue
        for path in base.rglob("*.json"):
            text = path.read_text(encoding="utf-8", errors="replace")
            lowered = text.lower()
            if "release_pass\":true" in lowered or "release_pass: true" in lowered:
                violations.append(str(path))
            if "fake receipt" in lowered or "placeholder receipt" in lowered:
                violations.append(str(path))
    print(json.dumps({"status":"ok" if not violations else "blocked_fake_proof_markers", "violations": violations, "release_pass": False}, ensure_ascii=False))
    return 0 if not violations else 2

if __name__ == "__main__":
    raise SystemExit(main())
Create file tests/governance/test_no_fake_proof_guard.py with content import subprocess
import sys

def test_no_fake_proof_guard_executes():
    result = subprocess.run([sys.executable, "governance/validators/validate_no_fake_proof_guard.py"], capture_output=True, text=True)
    assert result.returncode in (0, 2)
    assert "release_pass" in result.stdout
